message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence Diagram

participant "ColleagueCheckbox" as Checkbox
participant "LoginFrame" as Frame
participant "ColleagueTextField" as TextField
participant "ColleagueButton" as Button

activate Checkbox
activate Frame

Checkbox -> Frame: colleagueChanged
activate TextField
Frame -> TextField: setColleagueEnable
deactivate TextField
activate Button
Frame -> Button: setColleagueEnable
deactivate Button

deactivate Frame
Frame --> Checkbox
deactivate Checkbox

@enduml
```
